name: SIM Technology Group Limited
summary: SIM Technology Group Limited, an investment holding company, primarily designs, develops, manufactures, and sells handsets and Internet of Things (IOT) terminals. It operates through Handsets and IOT Terminals Business, Electronics Manufacturing Services Business, IOT System and Online-to-Offline Business, and Property Management segments. The company also offers electronic manufacturing services. In addition, it provides goods to vending machine customers; logistics services; and procurement agency and equipment finance lease services. Further, the company develops automated test equipment; and holds land use rights. Additionally, it develops, rents, and manages properties. The company has operations in the People's Republic of China, Europe, the United States, Hong Kong, and other Asian countries. SIM Technology Group Limited was founded in 1986 and is headquartered in Shanghai, the People's Republic of China.
